description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gcc Docker image with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs gcc -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -fPIC calculator.c -o calculator, then publishes the calculator binary and calculator.gcno file as artifacts. In the test stage add a functional-test job that first executes apt update && apt -y install gcovr, then runs test $(./calculator 1 + 1) = 2 and test $(./calculator 25 \* 5) = 125, and finally runs gcovr -r . to generate a coverage report, using the coverage regex /^TOTAL.*\s+(\d+\%)$/. No additional rules, caches, or services are defined.
